title: oSzouakua's: Better Blended Creepers
description: This pack makes the texture of creepers better blend with modern vanilla grass!
body:
# Description: This **resource** pack makes Creepers *blend in better* with modern Minecraft's vanilla grass texture, its not perfect, but its better!

![Preview of textured creeper in Dark Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TaZ0OYXH/images/46939d8c86695d009e9b971cbad8c36abc42c1ab.png) ![Preview of textured creeper in Jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TaZ0OYXH/images/4cb6a18d8df4c58254275cbdcba0ab155f25cf2d.png) ![Preview of textured creeper in Savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TaZ0OYXH/images/53824b58f8834e7b24742c736fcf370ae875d435.png) ![Preview of textured creeper on Moss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TaZ0OYXH/images/8e2f130e710d2d35ef1807faff40168492dbd382.png)
## Notes:
Client-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed on the Client






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
